title: corybas echinulus
intro: Corybas echinulus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Corybas echinulus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Corybas echinulus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
